title: Section 26226.4
text: The bylaws may provide that one or more directors may be chosen by a public official or commission or by the other directors selected by the members. The director shall represent primarily the interest of the general public in the association. The director shall have the same powers and rights as other directors. These directors shall not number more than one-fifth of the entire number of directors. (Added by Stats. 2017, Ch. 27, Sec. 107. (SB 94) Effective June 27, 2017.)
